description: A vertical graphic built on a photograph taken from behind of two officers in dark POLICE HSI jackets with U.S. flag patches escorting a man in a light blue shirt whose hands are cuffed behind his back, in a parking lot with vehicles. A dark panel at the bottom carries white text reading Criminals don't get second chances. They get handed to ICE.
notable_text: POLICE HSI; Criminals don't get second chances. They get handed to ICE
